title: Structure for assembly in a plastic fuel tank
abstract: A structure (230) for fixed assembly inside a plastic fuel tank comprising at least one rigid structural element configured to be fixed inside a plastic fuel tank; at least one transfer means (210) comprising a line having a first end (207), the at least one transfer means (210) being configured to transfer fuel to at least one delivery point (216), the at least one delivery point (216) being configured to deliver fuel to a fuel pump located inside the plastic fuel tank; at least one suction point (214) at the first end (207) of the transfer means (210), the at least one suction point (214) being configured to suck fuel from inside the plastic fuel tank from a remote location of the fuel pump, and wherein the at least one transfer means (210) and the at least one suction point (214) are integrally formed with the at least one rigid structural element.
claims: Claims ( 16 ) A structure (230) for fixed assembly inside a plastic fuel tank comprising: at least one rigid structural element configured to be fixed inside a plastic fuel tank; at least one transfer means (210) comprising a line having a first end (207) and a second end (209), the at least one transfer means (210) being configured to transfer fuel from the first end (207) of the at least one transfer means (210) to the second end (209) of the at least one transfer means (210); at least one delivery point (216) at the second end (209) of the transfer means (210), the at least one delivery point (216) being configured to deliver fuel to a fuel pump located inside the plastic fuel tank; at least one suction point (214) at the first end (207) of the transfer means (210), the at least one suction point (214) being configured to suck fuel from inside the plastic fuel tank from a remote location of the fuel pump, wherein the at least one transfer means (210) and the at least one suction point (214) are integrally formed with the at least one rigid structural element, and wherein the at least one rigid structural element comprises an anti-slosh means, such as a baffle. The structure (230) according to claim 1, wherein the structure is a carrier. The structure (230) according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the anti-slosh means is integrally formed with the at least one rigid structural element. The structure (230) according to anyone of claims 1 to 3, wherein the structure further comprises at least one reinforcement means (303, 305). The structure (230) according to claim 4, wherein the at least one reinforcement means (303, 305) is integrally formed with the at least one rigid structural elementand the at least one transfer means (210) is integrally formed with the at least one reinforcement means (303, 305). The structure (230) according to claim 4 or 5, wherein the at least one suction point (214) is integrally formed with the at least one reinforcement means (303, 305). The structure (230) according to anyone of claims 4 to 6, wherein the at least one reinforcement means (303, 305) comprises at least one connecting means (311, 312, 313, 314) configured to be welded or bonded to the inside of the plastic fuel tank so as to connect the at least one reinforcement (303, 305) means with the inside of the plastic fuel tank. The structure (230) according to anyone of the preceding claims, wherein the at least one transfer means (210) is fitted with a mesh or grid (318). The structure (230) according to anyone of the preceding claims, wherein the structure comprises a suction cup (232) connected to the at least one transfer means (210). The structure (230) according to claim 9, wherein the suction cup (232) comprises a flexible line. The structure (230) according to claim 10, wherein the flexible line and/or the suction cup (232) is fitted with a mesh or grid (319). A plastic fuel tank system for a vehicle, comprising: a plastic fuel tank (200) having a body (206) defining an interior space of the plastic fuel tank (200); a fuel pump (220) located inside the body (206) of the plastic fuel tank (200); the structure (230) according to anyone of claims 1 to 11; wherein the structure (230) is fixedly assembled inside the body (206) of the plastic fuel tank (200) and the at least one suction point (214) is located in a bottom of the body (206) of the plastic fuel tank (200) at a location remote from the fuel pump (220), and the at least one delivery point (216) is connected to an inlet port of the fuel pump (220). The plastic fuel tank system according to claim 12, wherein the plastic fuel tank (200) comprises a recess (234) in the bottom of the body (206) and the at least one suction point (214) is located in the recess (234). The plastic fuel tank system according to claim 12 or 13, wherein the body (206) of the plastic fuel tank (200) has a saddle configuration. A vehicle (100) comprising a plastic fuel tank system according to anyone of claims 12 to 14. A method of manufacturing a plastic fuel tank (200) for the plastic fuel tank system according to anyone of claims 12 to 14 by blow-moulding, the method comprising the steps of: providing a parison; providing an insertion pin; coupling the structure (230) according to anyone of claims 1 to 11 with the insertion pin; inserting the structure (230) that is coupled with the insertion pin inside the parison; blow moulding the parison into the body (206) of the plastic fuel tank (200).
